items.titolo: OpenAI's new image watermarks make it easier to spot AI fakes - here's how
items.descrizione: Older metadata could be stripped out. OpenAI's new approach hides signals in the pixels themselves.

items.titolo: Creare app Android in pochi minuti grazie a Google AI Studio
items.descrizione: Chiunque può creare app Android con Google AI Studio, basta descrivere l'app. Gemini la sviluppa con supporto GPS, Bluetooth e NFC. The post Creare app Android in pochi minuti grazie a Google AI Studio appeared first on

items.titolo: I’m a Normie. Can Normies Really Vibe Code?
items.descrizione: Apparently anyone can vibe code anything these days. So Claude and I tried to make a database for tracking the petty grievances of the masses.
